primary_topics: cement truck pressure vessel failure case
ASME code and National Board inspection

cases_mentioned.name: King Street Bridge failure (Melbourne)
cases_mentioned.frame: Doubler plate wrapped weld caused hydrogen crack on tension side; modern codes prohibit wrap-around welding.

cases_mentioned.name: Cement truck aluminum water tank explosion
cases_mentioned.frame: Lawyer doing engineering decided ASME doubler plates unnecessary; 100,000 tanks built without reinforcement; one killed welder in Pennsylvania.

cases_mentioned.name: Connecticut cement truck steering failure
cases_mentioned.frame: Muriatic acid leaked through seals corroded steering gears; truck driven off bridge.

cases_mentioned.name: Iowa hydro-test fatality (pre-Pennsylvania)
cases_mentioned.frame: Brand-new aluminum tank blew during pressure testing, took worker's legs off; attorney dismissed as one-off.

cases_mentioned.name: Tree stand turnbuckle court case (White Plains NY)
cases_mentioned.frame: Four pores on fracture surface used by opposing side as cause; Tom's ping-pong-balls-on-a-table analogy won the jury.

figures_referenced: 6% volume shrinkage of aluminum on solidification
30 ksi vs 50-70 ksi (non-heat-treatable vs heat-treatable aluminum)
Aluminum 5x cost of steel per equivalent volume
Aluminum melting 550-660 C vs hydrated oxide 1500-2000 C
55 psi air brake / garden hose pressure
5 psi safe test pressure for oil tanks
